key_risks: Sticky inflation readings prompting unexpected hawkish FOMC signals on June 17
Weaker-than-expected retail sales or employment data triggering broad equity rotation
Oil price volatility from scheduled EIA reports pressuring energy-sensitive sectors
Sharp reversal in momentum or semiconductor leadership due to valuation compression

portfolio.rationale: Recent 30d outperformance and sensitivity to domestic growth catalysts within scoring window
Strong trailing momentum factor performance likely to persist over one-month horizon
Elevated recent returns and exposure to earnings growth estimates in tech supply chain
Complements semiconductor tilt with broad sector exposure amid positive breadth signals

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated tilt toward small-value, momentum, and technology/semiconductor factors to capture domestic growth and earnings momentum over the June-July window while staying within 1-5 holdings and 5% increments.
rationale_summary: Allocation prioritizes factors with recent positive price action and alignment with scheduled data releases on growth and inflation that could support cyclical and tech exposure before July 13 exit.
